allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; pkgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['packages']; [print\(p['name'], p['version'], p['manifest_path']\) for p in pkgs if 'iroh' in p['name'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'],p['version'],p['manifest_path']\) for p in m['packages'] if 'iroh' in p['name']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; deps=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['packages'][0]['dependencies']; [print\(d['name'], d.get\('req',''\)\) for d in deps if 'iroh' in d['name']]")
